name: Arcane Archer
author: Poki
description: Arcane Archer is a fantasy adventure game where you play as - you guessed it - an archer! Take up your bow and arrow, fight your way through hordes of monsters and avoid the dangerous obstacles. At the end of each level, there’s a magical upgrade waiting for you. These can give you more health, floating shields, ice arrows and more! The game is designed to make new, never-before-seen levels each time you play, so there’s always a new challenge waiting for you. Can you make it through the dangerous world of Arcane Archer? How to play Arcane Archer? Move: use WASD or the arrow keys! Who created Arcane Archer? Arcane Archer is created by Onrush Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Tribals.io , Venge.io and Burger Bounty ! How can I play Arcane Archer for free? You can play Arcane Archer for free on Poki. Can I play Arcane Archer on mobile devices and desktop? Arcane Archer can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
